name: HWR_RECMND_CHECKLIST_VL
query: SELECT B.CHECKLIST_ID, B.IS_SEEDED, B.IS_ACTIVE, B.ORDER_RANK, B.CHECKLST_ATTR_1, B.CHECKLST_ATTR_2, B.CHECKLST_ATTR_3, T.CHECKLIST_NAME, T.DESCRIPTION, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_RECMND_CHECKLIST_B B, HWR_RECMND_CHECKLIST_TL T WHERE B.CHECKLIST_ID = T.CHECKLIST_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
